title: Pillar Candles, Pack of 2, Unscented, Long Burning Time, 15 x 7 cm / 6 x 2.75 in (Red, Matt)
features: 2 pcs of 15 x 7 cm / 6 x 2.75" Red Pillar Candles. Unscented. Up to 66 hours of burning time. Each candle is separately sealed.
Classic pillar candles. Beautiful in its simplicity. Perfect for people who value classics and a simple form, but do not forget to create an atmospheric interior atmosphere in their surroundings.
Pillar candles in our offer in many colours in metallic and matt versions will indeed find their place in our homes as well as in restaurants, wedding houses or catering companies.
Specification: Burning time ~ 66 hours. Height: 15 cm / 6". Diameter: 7 cm / 2.75". The highest quality paraffin wax, wicks and dyes were used in the production of candles.
The colours of the candles visible in the photos may be slightly different from the actual colour.
description: Product Description ✔️ PERFECT FOR HOME DECOR! Our classic candles are a perfect home decoration or element of interior design. Their warm flame will illuminate any room, creating a romantic aura. Candles will slowly melt until the end. It is an ideal decorative element. Decorative Household Candles - Unscented - Clean Burn - Long Burning Time Burn Time: Up to 66 hours (depending on the ambient and outside factors). Size: Height: 15 cm - 6" / Diameter: ⌀ 6.8 cm. Perfect for: Parties, Weddings, Restaurants, Home Decorations. Materials: Paraffin Wax, Cotton Wick. Vegan Friendly: YES (Paraffin Wax). IDEAL FOR: ✔️ Parties ✔️ Weddings ✔️ Restaurants ✔️ HIGHEST QUALITY Including our classic candles in interior design is a great way to create a unique atmosphere. Additionally, these candles can be burned alone or with several larger candles. This way we can create a well-styled room that everyone will love. Shining many of them simultaneously gives a very nice visual effect. ✔️ GREAT GIFT! The candles will be a great decoration for many interiors. It will find its place in the living room, hall or dining room. It will be perfect as a table decoration during any celebration, it will add style and elegance. It can be a perfect gift. Burn Time: Up to 66 hours (depending on the ambient and outside factors). Size: Height: 15 cm - 6" / Diameter: ⌀ 6.8 cm. Perfect for: Parties, Weddings, Restaurants, Home Decorations. Materials: Paraffin Wax, Cotton Wick. VERSATILE! Our classic candles are available in various colours! Everyone can find the best one to match the occasion and interior decoration. ✔️ WARM AND COSY ATMOSPHERE! Our candles' simple, classic appearance and the long burning time create an unforgettable atmosphere, making the odourless candles ideal as a decorative element of a home, hotel, office, banquet hall, massage salon, beauty salon, restaurant or other public space.
